title: Koalas Covering for Coal? Dirty Forest Offset Plan Would Mean More Fossil Fuels
summary: The Federal Government's new carbon credits method for 'protecting' native forests will allow fossil fuel companies to greenwash their climate pollution and expand coal and gas production, according to the Australia Institute. A new carbon accounting method,...
